case_title: CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A. VS. MARK A. SANBRAILO et al

docket_entries.description: RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A. AS TO DEFENDANT SANBRAILO, MARK A.
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 THRU 5, INCL.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SANBRAILO, MARK A. $20,730.02 PRINCIPAL, $1,674.48 INTEREST, $427.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $22,831.50, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JAN-30-2012 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 2:00 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, (TRANSACTION ID # 100010775) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A. AS TO DEFENDANT SANBRAILO, MARK A.

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A. AS TO DEFENDANT SANBRAILO, MARK A. DOES 1 THRU 5, INCL. SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  DEC-12-2011
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $427.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT SANBRAILO, MARK A.
DECLARATION PURSUANT TO CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE SECTION 1033 (B) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JAN-30-2012 IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $.00 CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED, $256.45 INTEREST, $.00 COSTS FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A.
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A.

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT & COMPLT; DECL PURSUANT TO CCP (395)B VENUE, PERSONAL, FAMILY OR HOUSEHOLD OBLIGATIONS; AND CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET [DECL OF MAILING & DECL OF DILIGENCE ATTACHED THERETO], PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A. SERVED AUG-30-2011, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT SANBRAILO, MARK A.
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A. SERVED AUG-30-2011, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT SANBRAILO, MARK A.
DECLARATION OF PLAINTIFF IN SUPPORT OF DEFAULT JUDGMENT AND IN SUPPORT OF ORDER ADMITTING COPIES INTO EVIDENCE IN LIEU OF ORIGINALS FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A.
DECLARATION PURSUANT TO INTEREST CALCULATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A.
EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT SANBRAILO, MARK A.
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $25,015.07 AS TO DEFENDANT SANBRAILO, MARK A.
